title: cyclomics/wf-cyseq-wg
description: CySeq analysis workflow for untargeted or genome-wide sequencing.

input.title: Input Options
input.description: Parameters for finding and handling input data for analysis.

sample_name.title: Sample name
sample_name.description: Override the sample name used in the pipeline.
sample_name.help_text: This option will override automated sample name detection and use the provided value instead.

input_dir.title: Input read directory
input_dir.description: A MinKnow sequencing output folder containing the `fastq_pass` subfolder, which may optionally contain `barcode` subfolders.
input_dir.help_text: This provided output folder is the same folder where MinKnow will write the sequencing summary file, which is necessary to flag the end of the real-time file ingestion.

reference.title: Reference genome FASTA file
reference.help_text: Reference genome to be used for consensus.

output.title: Output Options
output.description: Parameters for saving and naming workflow outputs

output_dir.title: Output directory name
output_dir.description: Name of the output directory for all workflow results. This directory will be saved within a unique run-specific folder.

advanced.title: Advanced Options
advanced.description: Advanced parameters for fine-tuning workflow behavior.

split_fastq_by_size.title: Split FASTQ by size
split_fastq_by_size.description: Split larger FASTQ files into smaller ones.

max_fastq_size.title: Maximum number of reads per FASTQ file
max_fastq_size.description: Maximum number of reads per FASTQ files in the analysis, only used when `split_fastq_by_size` is selected.

minimap2.mode.title: Minimap2 mode
minimap2.mode.help_text: The minimap2 preset to be used for raw read mapping. The default is `map-ont`, which is optimized for long ONT reads.

read_pattern.title: Input read pattern
read_pattern.description: Regular expression for fastq files used in the analysis.
read_pattern.help_text:
By default the regex looks for the folder pass and fastq_pass. pass is used when rebasecalling data. fastq_pass is created normally by MinKnow.
 You can limit the amount of data by altering this value e.g. by changing it to 
 {pass,fastq_pass}/**{1,2}.{fq,fastq,fq.gz,fastq.gz} 
 will only take in fastq files ending in 1 and 2.

epi2me_report.title: Generate timestamped report for EPI2ME
epi2me_report.description: If set to true, the real time report will be generated with a timestamp in the filename, suitable for visualization on EPI2ME. If set to false, the report will be generated without a timestamp in the filename, suitable for local visualization.

system.title: System settings
system.description: System-level parameters to adjust resource usage behaviour.

executor.cpus.title: CPUs
executor.cpus.description: Total number of CPUs available to the entire workflow to use simultaneously.

executor.memory.title: Memory
executor.memory.description: Total RAM available to the workflow.
